Bash(bash deploy_remote.sh --db "INSERT INTO ai_pricing_configs \(tenant_id, shop_id, template_name, template_type, target_roas, min_roas, gross_margin, daily_budget_limit, no_budget_limit, max_bid, min_bid, max_adjust_pct, auto_execute, is_active, description\) VALUES \(4, 2, '默认标准', 'default', 3.0, 1.8, 0.50, 2000.00, 0, 180.00, 3.00, 30.00, 0, 1, '默认模板'\), \(4, 2, '保守测试', 'conservative', 2.0, 1.5, 0.50, 500.00, 0, 100.00, 3.00, 15.00, 0, 1, '新品冷启动'\), \(4, 2, '激进冲量', 'aggressive', 4.0, 2.5, 0.50, 9999.00, 1, 300.00, 3.00, 25.00, 0, 1, '爆款大促'\)")

Bash(bash deploy_remote.sh --db "ALTER TABLE ad_campaigns ADD COLUMN pricing_config_id INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关联调价策略模板ID', ADD COLUMN custom_max_bid DECIMAL\(10,2\) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '单活动覆盖最高出价', ADD COLUMN custom_daily_budget DECIMAL\(10,2\) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '单活动覆盖日预算', ADD COLUMN custom_target_roas DECIMAL\(5,2\) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '单活动覆盖目标ROAS'")

Bash(bash deploy_remote.sh --db "ALTER TABLE ai_pricing_suggestions ADD COLUMN template_name VARCHAR\(100\) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '模板名称', ADD COLUMN data_source VARCHAR\(50\) DEFAULT 'today_only' COMMENT '数据来源', ADD COLUMN campaign_data_days INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '活动历史天数', ADD COLUMN is_new_campaign TINYINT\(1\) DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否新活动', ADD COLUMN shop_avg_roas DECIMAL\(5,2\) DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '店铺平均ROAS'")
Bash(bash deploy_remote.sh --db "SELECT id, template_name, template_type, target_roas, min_roas FROM ai_pricing_configs")
